series_metadata.series_description: As of 01/21/2018 the Ohio State Barber Board has been abolished and all active and retained schedules have moved to the State Cosmetology and Barber Board. Inactive/Lapsed Licensee files provide proof of licensure of Inactive/lapsed barbers. File may also serve as reference to action taken by the Board, including but not limited to reinstatements, violations and any discipline.
